title: teucrium japonicum var. japonicum
intro: Teucrium japonicum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese germander, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Japanese germander include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Japanese germander is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
